title: Arcoroc Aspen Bowl 12cm, 510ml, 6 Bowls
features: The Luminarc Aspen bowl offered here can not only convince as a fruit bowl or salad bowl, there are no limits to use.

Premium quality: products from the Luminarc brand stand for revolutionary ideas for any dining experience at the table. Whether practical, shape-rich, colourful: Luminarc is the perfect companion for your kitchen in the 21st century.
Look and design: whether at home with family and friends, in the office, in the restaurant or hotel, Luminarc products are practical and always usable.
Versatility: The item offered here has a maximum capacity - filled to the brim - of 510 ml. This product is suitable for cleaning in the dishwasher.
Dimensions and weight: diameter: 120 mm, height: 54 mm, weight: 165 g, maximum capacity - volume filled to the brim: 510 ml, material: glass, packaging unit: 6
description: From the manufacturer Arc was founded in 1825 in Arques, a city in the north of France. To this day, the headquarters of the Arc Group are located there, as well as the research and development department and the largest glass manufacturing site in the world. Although the company is firmly anchored in its region of origin, Arc's expertise extends far beyond the French border. With five production sites in France, the USA, China, the United Arab Emirates as well as Russia, this world leader in tableware can produce up to five million glass products daily. The Arc Group is represented by six brands: Cristal d'Arques Paris, Luminarc, Arcoroc, Chef & Sommelier, Arcopal and Eclat. Arc pursues one goal: to bring the beauty of tableware within reach of all people around the world! In 1948, Jacques Durand founded Luminarc to offer its customers all over the world the best table art at an affordable price. Since then, the brand has always complied with this commitment of the founder. It is still the same goal: to awaken you the desire to treat yourself to simple, modern and practical tableware. A tableware that you can renew as you like to make your table special in everyday life or on holidays. The creativity of Luminarc comes to your table! For more than 70 years, Luminarc has expressed French lifestyle through tableware in always current and practical shapes, motifs and colours. Luminarc also inspires: The brand encourages you to make the collections your own and rework them as you please? Feel Creative! Creativity made by Luminarc comes to your table today more than ever.
